mapper.select: SELECT code_detail_id, code_group_id, code_value, code_name, code_desc, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tbl_code_detail WHERE code_detail_id = #{codeDetailId} AND use_yn = TRUE

SELECT code_detail_id, code_group_id, code_value, code_name, code_desc, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tbl_code_detail WHERE code_group_id = #{codeGroupId} AND use_yn = TRUE ORDER BY sort_order, code_value

SELECT d.code_detail_id, d.code_group_id, d.code_value, d.code_name, d.code_desc, d.sort_order, d.use_yn, d.reg_dt, d.upd_dt FROM tbl_code_detail d JOIN tbl_code_group g ON d.code_group_id = g.code_group_id WHERE g.group_code = #{groupCode} AND d.use_yn = TRUE AND g.use_yn = TRUE ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.code_value
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_code_detail (code_group_id, code_value, code_name, code_desc, sort_order, use_yn, reg_dt, upd_dt) VALUES (#{codeGroupId}, #{codeValue}, #{codeName}, #{codeDesc}, #{sortOrder}, TRUE, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_code_detail SET use_yn = FALSE, upd_dt = NOW() WHERE code_detail_id = #{codeDetailId} AND use_yn = TRUE
